creator: thomas.dreibholz@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 206527
The shar file

The package tsctp has been missing in the FreeBSD ports. Therefore, I have created a port.

TSCTP is an SCTP test tool. Its purpose is to perform basic SCTP functionality tests to check implementations interoperability and to verify that the SCTP stack is working. 

Homepage of tsctp: https://www.uni-due.de/~be0001/tsctp/

Fix: The shar file tsctp-0.7.3.shar is attached.
